title: DeviceInfo
description: This field contains information related to the consumer device used to authorize with your product or service.

deviceType.description: The device type used to authorize your product or service.

country.description: The country where the consumer device is located when attempting to authorize with your product or service.

ipCarrier.description: The service provider used by the consumer device when attempting to authorize with your product or service.

city.description: The city where the consumer device is located when attempting to authorize with your product or service.

browser.description: The name of the browser used to authorize your product or service.

state.description: The state where the consumer device is located when attempting to authorize with your product or service.

platform.description: The device platform used to authorize your product or service.
